questionHtml:
A circuit consists of a cell of emf E = 3.0 V and four resistors connected as shown. Resistors R1 and R4 are 1.0 Ω and resistors R2 and R3 are 2.0 Ω.

What is the voltmeter reading?

A.  0.50 V

B.  1.0 V

C.  1.5 V

D.  2.0 V

meta.title: A circuit consists of a cell of emf E = 3.0 V and four resistors connected as shown. Resistors R1 and R4 are 1.0 Ω and resistors R2 and R3 are 2.0 Ω. What is the voltmeter reading?
